about.description:
Timesheets from Jira worklogs - with manual time entry,
calendar and year view plus Excel and PDF export.
config.title: Configuration
confirm.delete_manual: The manual entry {ticket} from {entry_date} with {hours} h will be deleted permanently.
confirm.title: Really delete?
detail.author: Author
jira.error_html_hint: Note: response is an HTML page (likely proxy/WAF/login page), not a Jira JSON response.
jira.login_failed: Jira login failed. Please check the token.
log.hint_settings: [yellow]Note: Jira host and/or token not set. Press [bold][S][/bold] for settings.[/yellow]
log.ready: Ready. Press [bold][G][/bold] to generate the timesheet.
manual.err_hours: Please enter an effort greater than 0 (e.g. 3h 30m).
manual.err_ticket_or_summary: Please fill in at least ticket or description.
menu.manual_new: Record manual time for this day
notify.email_not_set: Email not set! Press [S] for settings.
notify.host_not_set: Jira host not set! Press [S] for settings.
notify.manual_delete_error: Manual entry could not be deleted
notify.manual_save_error: Manual entry could not be saved
notify.manual_select_first: Please select a manual entry first
notify.token_not_set: Jira token not set! Press [S] for settings.
save_dialog.title: Save timesheet as
settings.budget_detect_multi: Multiple fields found, first one set: {listing}
settings.budget_detect_need_creds: Host, email and token must be filled in.
settings.budget_detect_none: No custom field with 'budget' in its name found. Please enter it manually.
settings.budget_detect_tip: Reads all custom fields from Jira and fills in the budget field automatically. Cloud mode only.
settings.budget_field_tip: Custom field ID of the budget field (e.g. customfield_36461). On Jira Cloud you can find it via 'Auto-detect'.
settings.columns_hint: Display controls the list view, Export the Excel and PDF file. The label applies to the export; the list keeps its translated headings. Left empty, the default label applies.
settings.customers_tip: Comma-separated list for the customer dropdown in the manual time dialog.
settings.default_customer_tip: Used in the customer column for all entries fetched from Jira. Manual entries may differ.
settings.email_tip: Cloud: your Atlassian login email (for basic auth). Data Center (legacy): your Jira username.
settings.host_tip: Base URL of the Jira instance. Cloud: https://YOUR-COMPANY.atlassian.net (canonical URL, not the custom domain).
settings.hourly_rate_tip: Net hourly rate in EUR. Only for net/gross in the TUI summary and year view - not exported.
settings.manual_color_hint: Accepts #FF0000, FF0000, #F00 or 255,0,0. Invalid input falls back to red.
settings.manual_color_tip: Colour for manually recorded time in the list, Excel and PDF.
settings.proxy_hint: Behind a corporate proxy (e.g. Zscaler) enter the proxy here, otherwise the connection fails with "All connection attempts failed". Format: http://HOST:PORT. Applies to HTTP and HTTPS.
settings.proxy_url_tip: Optional HTTP proxy for the Jira connection, e.g. http://proxy.example.com:8080 (corporate proxy/Zscaler). Leave empty for a direct connection; httpx will still read the HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY environment variables.
settings.target_export: Show target hours in Excel/PDF export
settings.ticket_links_export: Show ticket links in Excel/PDF export
settings.token_tip: Cloud: API token from id.atlassian.com. Data Center (legacy): personal access token (PAT).
settings.use_legacy_api_hint: Off = Jira Cloud (REST v3, basic auth with email + API token). On = legacy Jira Server/Data Center (REST v2, bearer token, ScriptRunner JQL).
settings.vat_rate_tip: VAT rate in percent for the gross calculation (default 19). Comma or dot as separator.
tooltip.anonymize: Replaces tickets, ticket text and authors with dummy values for screenshots. Real data is preserved in the cache.
tooltip.details: Shows all fields of the highlighted worklog entry including the ticket link in a modal dialog.
tooltip.excel: Exports the current timesheet as an Excel file with live formulas (hour and km chains stay editable).
tooltip.generate: Loads the worklogs for the configured period from Jira and builds the timesheet. Completed months come from the local cache.
tooltip.info: Shows version, author, license and a random quote about the app.
tooltip.manual_entry: Record time that is not booked in Jira, or edit the selected manual entry
tooltip.pdf: Exports the current timesheet as a PDF in landscape orientation.
tooltip.quit: Closes the application. Unsaved worklog data is not lost — it will be reloaded from Jira on demand.
tooltip.reset_cache: Clears the local worklog cache (~/.jira-timesheet/cache). The next fetch will pull all months fresh from Jira.
tooltip.settings: Opens settings: Jira host/token, email, federal state, target hours, hourly rate, logo, language.
tooltip.switch_view: Switches between list view and calendar view of the current timesheet.
tooltip.theme: Switches to the next theme in alphabetical order (Ctrl+P opens the full theme picker).
tooltip.toggle_log: Shows or hides the log panel at the bottom.
tooltip.year: Loads worklogs for every month of the year configured in settings and shows a yearly overview with forecast.
year.title: Year view {year}
